extraction.one_line_summary: DAINESE Alberto won bunch sprint in Shepparton after early 5-man break absorbed with 5km remaining, taking leader's jersey.
tactical_patterns: MITCHELTON-SCOTT committed single rider WELSFORD to pacing at 30km out, minimal team investment for flat stage control.
Break time gap capped at ~3min despite faster-than-schedule peloton pace suggesting teams prioritized positioning over suppression.

rider_signals.DAINESE Alberto: positive: Former SEG Racing sprinter won from compromised position through tight final corner, suggesting bike handling advantage over pure power
rider_signals.GROVES Kaden: positive: Challenged fellow SEG Racing alumnus DAINESE in World Tour debut sprint, delivered by MITCHELTON-SCOTT positioning
rider_signals.COYLE Jesse: negative: Attempted solo bridge to breakaway then abandoned effort before second intermediate sprint, poor pacing judgment
